text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's the last day of summer camp.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Over here, Sweep! Over here! I found the black
cat!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Nice work, Kitasan!
Hehe, I'm gonna give you so many pets! Yes, I
am! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Uh, Kitasan... What are you doing?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
What do you mean?! I thought you said you were
going to give me pets!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
What are you, some kinda dummy? You know
you're not a cat, right?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
(Whew! Petting that black cat has recharged my
magic, so now I'm totally prepared for the Shuka
Sho!)

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
So you're saying you feel confident about your
performance in the autumn Tenno Sho?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
The Autumn Shield will be mine. And after that... I
will go for the Senior Autumn Triple Crown!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
The book is already open. All that everyone
needs to do is...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Fill your hearts with anticipation for the heroic
tale of Zenno Rob Roy!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Would you look at that. She's really perked up,
hasn't she?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
(Yeah, come to think of it... Racing Rob Roy just
might be...)
